english_query: Either the cake is chocolate or the cake is vanilla. The cake is chocolate. Therefore, the cake is not vanilla. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says the sweet food is either dark brown or white. This means it must be one or the other. It cannot be both. It cannot be none. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us the sweet food is dark brown. Now we put these two ideas together. Since the first idea says it must be one or the other, and the second idea says it is the dark brown one, the white one cannot be true. If it were white, then the first idea would be wrong because it would be both. But the first idea says it is one or the other. So, if it is dark brown, it is not white. The last idea says the sweet food is not white. This fits with what we found. So the last idea follows for sure from the first two ideas. follows

english_query: It looks like god did not make the first human body all by himself. The great old church teacher says that god uses spirit helpers to get things done with bodies. But the first human body was made from body stuff. So the spirit helpers did the work, and god did not do it all by himself.
ugf_response: Even though spirit helpers help god with body things, god can do some body things that are too big for spirit helpers, like waking up dead people or helping people who cannot see. With this big power, god made the first human body from the wet ground. Still, the spirit helpers could help by getting the ground ready, just like they will help by gathering the dust when people wake up at the end.

english_query: And what do you think of the people who teach for money, who are the only ones who teach? Do they seem to you to be teachers of being good?
ugf_response: I often wonder, old teacher, that the well known teacher of speaking is never heard promising to teach being good: and when he hears others promising he only laughs at them; but he thinks that men should be taught to speak.

english_query: why a true belief for bad reasons is not the same as knowing
ugf_response: First, we think about what it means to know a thing. To know, we must believe it is true, it must be true, and we must have a good reason for our belief. Now, imagine a person who believes a thing is true. The thing is true. But the reason the person has for this belief is bad or wrong. To show this, let us look at a case. A person might look at a thing that shows the time. This thing is broken. But it happens to show the right time at that moment. The person sees the time and believes it is that time. The time is right. So the person has a true belief. However, the person does not know the time because the thing showing the time is broken. The person got the right answer by chance, not by a good way of finding out. This shows that having a true belief is not enough for knowing. We need the right reason to go with the truth. If the reason is bad, we do not really know, even if we are right. This is why a true belief for bad reasons is not the same as knowing.

english_query: why treating people as things to use is always wrong
ugf_response:
First, the first idea says that a person is not a thing that does not have thoughts and cannot feel, so it cannot be used the way we use a thing that helps us get work done. A person has thoughts, feelings, and a life that can be hurt or helped. The first idea also says that when we see a person only as a thing that does not have thoughts and cannot feel, we forget that the person can feel pain, can want things, and can have a need for care.

Second, the second idea says that because a person is not a thing that does not have thoughts and cannot feel, it is always wrong to act toward a person as if they were a thing that does not have thoughts and cannot feel that we can use. From the first idea it follows that if we use a person like a thing that does not have thoughts and cannot feel, we will cause hurt, we will make the person feel less seen as good, and we will make it harder for the person to live a good life. The second idea also says that if we let any one act toward another as a thing that does not have thoughts and cannot feel, then all people may end up being hurt more often.

Third, the thinking behind these ideas is clear and makes sense. It rests on what we see in real life: when people are used in that way, they often feel sad, angry, or hurt, and the group around them can feel less safe. The thinking also fits the way most of us want to act: we want to act in ways that do not cause hurt and that let each person feel they count. Because the ideas fit what we see and feel, the thinking can be called good. It points to a simple idea that we should act toward each person as a person, not as a thing that does not have thoughts and cannot feel, and that simple idea helps keep hurt low and keep good feeling high.

english_query: It looks like the soul is the same kind of thing as a bright spirit from god. Because each thing is set to its right end by its kind, which gives it a pull toward that end. But the end of the soul is the same as that of a bright spirit from god, which is lasting good. So they are the same kind of thing.
ugf_response: This talk comes from the near and real end. Lasting good is the last and not-of-real end.

english_query: how to decide when the right thing to do is not clear
ugf_response:
Person number one: I am having a hard time. I do not know what is the good thing to do. There are two ways to go, and both feel okay and both feel bad. How do I pick?

Person number two: This is a hard thing that many people feel. When you do not know what is right, you must look at what will happen. First, you can look at what will make the most good for the most people. You can count the good things and the bad things that will come from each way.

Person number one: But what if the good things are hard to see or hard to count? What if one way helps one person a lot, but the other way helps many people just a little bit?

Person number two: That is a very good point. If you cannot count the good things, you can look at what kind of person you want to be. You can ask yourself if the thing you do fits with what you believe is good. You can ask if you would want everyone else in the world to do the same thing in that same way.

Person number one: So I should look at the end of what I do, and also look at the way I act?

Person number two: Yes. You look at the end to see the good and the bad that will come. Then you look at the way you act to see if you are being a good person. If the two ways do not tell you anything, you might have to wait or ask someone you trust for help. Sometimes you must just pick the way that does the least hurt.

english_query: the idea that the right thing is usually between two wrong things
ugf_response: First, we look at two ways to do a thing that are both bad. One way is to do too much, and the other way is to do too little. Both of these ways lead to bad things happening. Then we think about a way that is not too much and not too little. This middle way is often the best way. This means that the right thing is found in the space between the two wrong things. We can see this in many parts of life. For one case, being too scared is bad, and not being scared at all is also bad. The right size of fear keeps us safe but lets us try new things. So, we learn to look for the middle path when we face hard choices. This helps us avoid the trouble that comes from going to either side.

english_query: why some things you must never do to another person no matter what
ugf_response: First, we must think about what makes a person a person. We see that every person has a mind and a way of feeling things. This makes each person a thing that is special and has its own life. Second, we think about how we want others to act toward us. Most people want to be safe and want their own choices to be seen as good and important. Third, we see that if we do something very bad to another person, we take away their life as they know it. We might break their body or break their mind so they cannot be themselves anymore. The thing after the third thing, we look at what happens if everyone did these bad things. If everyone could do anything they wanted to hurt others, no one would ever be safe. The world would be a place of fear and pain that does not end. The thing after the thing after the third thing, we see that to live together, we must have some things that we do not do. We must agree that some ways of acting are not okay. This is not because of a book of laws, but because of how we must act toward each other to stay alive and stay whole. Finally, we see that we must never do these things because it would mean we are no longer living in a world where people can be free or safe. If we do these things, we end the very thing that makes life good for everyone.

english_query: the question of whether animals feeling pain matters as much as people
ugf_response:
Many people ask if the hurt that a dog or a large thing that gives white drink feels is the same as the hurt a person feels. This is a big question about how we should act toward living things. To think about this, we must look at what it means to feel bad or to feel hurt.

First, we look at the way things feel. When a person is hurt, their body sends a sign to their head. This sign says, "This is bad! Stop this!" Most living things also have this sign. When a living thing is hurt, it cries out or tries to run away. This shows that the living thing is feeling something bad. Because they both feel bad, some people say that their hurt is the same. They say that if it is bad for a person to be hurt, it must also be bad for a living thing to be hurt.

Second, we look at how much a living thing can think. Some people think that people are more important because we can think about the time before now and what might happen after now. We can think about what happened the day before this one and what might happen when the sun comes up again. We can think about the meaning of our lives. They say that because a living thing might not think this way, the hurt of the living thing does not matter as much. They think that the power to think about the world makes the life of a person have more good.

Third, we look at how we act toward others. If we say that only people matter, then we might do things to living things that are very bad. We might act toward them like things instead of living things that are alive. But if we say that all things that feel hurt matter, then we must be more careful. We must think about how what we do will make other living things feel.

There are two main ways to look at this. One way is to say that only people have the special kind of mind that makes them important. The other way is to say that the power to feel hurt is what matters most. If you can feel bad, you are a thing that matters. This way of thinking says that we should try not to cause hurt to any living thing that can feel it.

english_query: To be sure; I remember it all, and I do not think that those who are in this state know things.
ugf_response: When a person at the time of learning writes the name of the first man, and thinks that he should write and does write the first two marks; but, again, meaning to write the name of the second man, thinks that he should write and does write the first two marks--can we think that he knows the first parts of your two names?

english_query: how to build your own set of rules for making hard choices
ugf_response:
You sit with a big feeling that you must choose a way to act when you face a choice that feels hard. The feeling comes because there are many things you could think about – what you want, what will help you, what will hurt you, what other people think, what will stay with you later. The hard thing is that there is no one clear path that fits every time, so you ask yourself how to make a small group of ideas you can turn to when a hard choice comes up.

One way people think about this is to write down a few ideas that feel true for them and then try to follow those ideas each time they must choose. Some say it is good to start with what you need most right now – things like staying safe, keeping love, or keeping a promise. They say that if you keep those needs at the front of your mind, the choice will line up with what matters most to you. Others say it is better to think about what will make the most good for the most people, even if it means you give up a little of what you want. They feel that looking at the wider group helps keep you from being too caught up in just your own part of the story.

A different group of people say you should first look at what you feel inside – the big feeling, the calm or the worry – and let that feeling lead you. They think that the feeling from inside is a kind of picture that points to the right way for you, because it comes from the many tiny things you have lived through. Yet another set of voices say you should ask a friend or a family member and see what they think. They feel that a second set of eyes can catch places you cannot see that you might miss on your own.

Why do these different ideas appear? One reason is that each person lives in a world that looks a little different. Some have a life that is mostly about work, some about family, some about learning. Because the world looks different, the ideas that feel true to them also look different. Another reason is that the feeling of being stuck can come from many places – fear, hope, love, a thing you feel you must do – and each of those feelings pulls you in a different direction. So the help you build may need to hold a set of those pulls, and the set will look different for each person.

What you can do is first notice the feeling that makes you stop and think. Then you can ask yourself a few simple things: What do I need most right now? Who will feel the most from what I do? What does my deep feeling say? Who can I ask to help see the whole? Write the answers down in a short set that you can look at when a hard choice shows up. Over time you can see if the short set helps you feel less stuck, and you can add or change the ideas as you learn more about what works for you. In this way you make a small set of ideas that belong to you, and you have a way to use them when the next hard choice comes.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response: First, we look at how our minds work. We all have some things we think are true before we see new things. These old thoughts are like a way we use to catch new facts. When we see something new, our mind uses this way to understand it. If the new thing fits the way, we think it is true. If it does not fit, we might ignore it or change it to fit. This is the hard part. We want to see the world as it really is. But our old thoughts make us see what we want to see. Some people say this is bad. They think we should try to forget our old thoughts. They say we must look at new things with fresh eyes. They believe this is the only way to find the truth. Other people say this is not possible. They say we cannot turn off our minds. They think it is better to know what we believe and watch for it. They say we should check if our old thoughts are right. They believe we can still learn if we are careful. Both sides want to know the truth. But they see the problem in different ways. One side wants to stop the mind from changing facts. The other side wants to use the mind better. This makes us think about how we learn. It shows that seeing is not just looking. It is also thinking with what we already know.

english_query: the problem with thinking only two choices exist when there are more
ugf_response:
The person is telling us about a way of thinking that is bad. The first idea they give us is that sometimes people think there are only two ways to do something or two things that can be true. They say that people often see only two paths when there are actually many more paths that could be taken. This is the part that is true. In our world, things are often not just one thing or the other thing. There is often a middle way or many other ways that we do not see at first.

The second idea is what they think follows from this. They think that if we only see two ways, we will make a bad choice. We might pick one way and think it is the only way to go, but we miss the best way because it was not one of the two ways we saw. This means our way of thinking is not good because it makes us miss the truth and the best way to act.

The third part is whether their way of thinking is good. Their way of thinking is good because it helps us see that we must look for more than just two ways. If we only look at two ways, we are not using our heads well. We are not looking at everything that is there. To use our heads well, we must look at all the things that could be true. If we do not do this, we will be wrong many times. Their thinking is good because it tells us to be more careful when we make a choice.

english_query: how a group can agree on rules that are good for everyone
ugf_response:
A group of people wants to live or work together in a way that is good. To do this, they need to decide on a set of ways to act. These ways are the things everyone must do or must not do. When everyone follows these ways, life is easy and everyone gets what they should. But making these ways is not easy. People have different needs. One person might want more money, while another person might want more free time. One person might want to be the leader, while another person wants to be left alone.

The hard question is how to find the ways of acting that are good for every single person in the group. How do we know if a way of acting is good if some people get more than others? How can we make sure that the group does not hurt the people who are small or have little power? This is a very big problem because it is hard to make everyone happy at the same time.

Some people say we should look at what happens after we make a way of acting. They think we should pick the way that brings the most good to the most people. They say if a way of acting makes ten people happy but makes one person sad, it is still a good way. They believe the whole lot of good is what matters most.

Other people say this is wrong. They say we cannot use people like things to get a good end. They think we must have ways of acting that show we care for every person no matter what. They say that even if a way of acting makes many people happy, it is a bad way if it hurts one person in a bad way. They believe that some things are always right and some things are always wrong, and we must not change them just to make more people happy.

There are also people who say we should look at what we would want if we did not know who we were in the group. Imagine you do not know if you will be the rich person or the poor person, the strong person or the person with little power. If you do not know your place, you will pick ways of acting that are good to everyone, because you might be the person at the bottom. This is a way to find a good way by taking away what we know about our own lives. Each group of people will look at this problem in a different way, and they will keep talking until they find a way to live together.

english_query: how to think about what is fair when people start in different places
ugf_response:
The person is talking about how to think about what is right when people do not start their lives in the same way. The first idea they give is that people are born into different ways of living. Some people have much and some people have very little. This is a thing that is true in our world. Some people have many good things and some people do not have enough to live well. This is a part of life that we can see.

The second idea is what they think comes from this first idea. They say that if we want things to be right, we must look at where people start. They think that we cannot say things are right just because we act toward everyone in the same way right now. If one person starts with much and another starts with nothing, acting toward them in the same way will not make things right. They think we must look at the start to know if the end is good.

The third idea is whether the way they think is good. We must look at how they move from the first idea to the second idea. The way they think is good because it looks at the whole story of a person and not just one moment in time. However, it is hard to know how much we should change things to make them right. It is hard to know how much help is enough. We must be very careful when we try to make things right for everyone.

english_query: Also, the old teacher who thought much says truth is a good way of being that is not the same as being right in giving. So truth is not part of what being right in giving means.
ugf_response: The truth the old teacher talks about here is the good way of being where a person shows in word and act who he really is. This is about fitting the sign to the thing shown; it is not about fitting the thing made to what makes it and what leads it: as was said about the truth of being right in giving.

english_query: Either the answer is yes or the answer is no. The answer is not yes. Therefore, the answer is no. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea which says there are only two choices for the answer: it is yes or it is no. Then, we look at the second idea which tells us that the answer is not yes. Since the first idea says one of the two choices must be true, and the second idea removes the first choice, the only choice left is that the answer is no. So, the last idea follows for sure from the earlier ideas. follows

english_query: Also, when the cause is there, the thing caused comes. But what God knows has no start or end. So if what God knows causes made things, it looks like made things have no start or end.
ugf_response: What God knows causes things only as they are in his mind. Now, it was not in the mind of God that things have no start or end; so even though what God knows has no start or end, it does not mean made things have no start or end.

english_query: If she takes the medicine, then her headache goes away. Her headache does not go away. Therefore, she does not take the medicine. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if she takes the special drink, then her head pain goes away. This is a promise about what happens when she takes the drink. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that her head pain does not go away. We know this is true. Now we need to see if the last idea must be true. The last idea says she does not take the special drink. Let us think about this. If she had taken the special drink, the first idea says her pain would go away. But her pain did not go away. So it cannot be true that she took the special drink. If she took it, the pain would be gone. Since the pain is still there, she must not have taken it. There is no other way for both the first idea and the second idea to be true while she took the special drink. So the last idea has to be true. It follows for sure. follows

english_query: If the engine has fuel, then the car can move. The engine has no fuel. Therefore, the car cannot move. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if the engine has the stuff that makes it run, then the car can move. This is an if-then thing. The if part is having the stuff. The then part is the car moving. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the engine has no such stuff. This means the if part did not happen. Now we must decide if the last idea follows for sure. The last idea says the car cannot move. We know that having the stuff lets the car move. But we do not know if the stuff is the only way for the car to move. Maybe someone pushes the car. Maybe the car rolls down a hill. The first idea does not say that the stuff is the only thing that makes the car go. It just says that the stuff is enough to make it go. So, even if there is no stuff, the car might still move in another way. We can imagine a story where the engine has no stuff, but a strong man pushes the car, so the car moves. In this story, the first two ideas are true, but the last idea is not true. Since we can imagine this, the last idea does not follow for sure from the first two. does not follow

english_query: Also, whatever we say of god and of made things, belongs to god in a better way than to made things. But words for numbers show a real thing in made things; so much more so in god.
ugf_response: The idea of many things, which shows a real thing in made things, is a kind of how much there is, and cannot be used when speaking of god: different from a many-thing idea that adds only not-being-cut into parts to those of which it is said. Such a kind of many-thing idea can be used for god.

english_query: Either the package arrives today or the package arrives tomorrow. The package does not arrive today. Therefore, the package arrives tomorrow. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First we see that the first idea says that either the thing that is sent arrives today or the thing that is sent arrives tomorrow. The second idea says that the thing that is sent does not arrive today. So the first part of the either is not true. From the first idea if one part is not true then the other part must be true. That means the thing that is sent arrives tomorrow. There is no other way to make the first idea true because it needs one of the two days. So the last idea follows for sure. follows

english_query: the problem with thinking only two choices exist when there are more
ugf_response:
Person 1: I am stuck. I have to pick between going to the party or staying home. It feels like I can only do one or the other. What do you think?

Person 2: Do you really have to pick just one of those two things? Are there other ways you could spend your time?

Person 1: I do not know. It seems like those are the only choices. If I do not go to the party, I must stay in.

Person 2: That is not true. You could go to the party for a short time and then leave. You could also ask a friend to come over to your house. You could even go for a walk in the green place with trees.

Person 1: I never thought about those other ideas. I was so set on the two big paths that I missed the smaller ones.

Person 2: That is a bad thing people often do. When we think there are only two paths, we often pick the wrong one because we did not see the better way in the middle.

Person 1: So I should look for more ways before I decide. That makes sense.

Person 2: Yes. Always look for the third way. It is often the best one.

english_query: how to find the hidden parts of someone's case
ugf_response:
When you want to know the whole story about what a person did or what happened to them, you must look for the things they do not say. Most people only tell the parts of the story that make them look good or the parts that are easy to say. To find the parts that are not seen, you must work in steps.

First, you must look at what the person tells you. Write down every word they say. Then, look for the places where the story stops. A place where the story stops too soon or does not make sense is where a piece of the story is missing. If a person tells you they went to a place, but they do not say how they got there or who they saw, that is a missing piece. These missing pieces are where the hidden things live.

Second, you must look at what the person does. People often say one thing but do another. If a person says they are happy but their face looks sad or their hands shake, the shaking hands tell a different story. You must watch their body and what they do to see if those things are the same as their words. If they are not the same, the truth is probably in the part that is not the same.

Third, you must look for other things that show what happened. This could be papers, or things they own, or what other people say. If two people tell you two different stories about the same thing, you must look for a third way to know what is true. You might look at a paper that shows a time or a place. This paper does not have feelings and it does not try to look good, so it can tell you the truth that the person is hiding.

The step after the third step is to ask questions that do not let the person give a short answer. Do not ask questions that can be answered with yes or no. Instead, ask them to tell you the whole story of a moment. If you ask them to tell you about a time, they will have to speak more. When they speak more, they might say something that they did not mean to say, or they might say something that does not fit with the rest of their story.

Finally, you must put all these pieces together. You take the words, the things they do, the other things you found, and the new things they said when you asked more questions. You look at them all at once. When you see where they all meet, you will see the shape of the hidden story. The hidden story is the part that fills the missing pieces and makes all the pieces fit together.

english_query: how the kind of person you are matters more than following rules
ugf_response:
Imagine a place like a school where there is a group of things that everyone says they must do, such as wear the same clothes, be on time, and not talk when a teacher talks. One child in that place is very kind, always helps a friend who fell, shares food, and says sorry when they hurt a feeling. Another child follows the group of things very well but does not help anyone and often looks away when a friend is sad. The first child sometimes breaks the group of things by talking too much or being a little late, but the other child never breaks the group of things. People in the school see both and wonder which one is more important.  

The hard question that comes up is whether the kind of person you are matters more than the group of things you say you must do. Some people think that the group of things keeps the group safe and right, so they say the group of things is the most important thing. Others think that the way a person acts inside, the kind they are, is the real thing that makes a good place, even if they sometimes do not follow the group of things. The question feels hard because both ideas seem to have good parts and both can make a place feel safe or feel warm.  

First, one group of people will answer that the group of things is the best help. They say that if each person follows the group of things, then the group will not have fights, will know what to expect, and will not need to guess what a good person looks like. They may have seen times when a kind person broke the group of things and caused trouble, like when a child ran out of the room to help a friend and left a class without a teacher knowing. For them, the group of things is a way to keep the group safe even if it sometimes stops a kind act.  

Second, another group will answer that the kind of person is the real help. They say that a kind heart will find ways to do what is right even when the group of things says something else. They point to the first child who helped a friend, saying that the friend felt safe and happy because of that act, not because the child wore the same clothes or was on time. They may have seen times when the set of things was too hard, like when that set stopped a child from speaking up about a problem and that caused hurt.  

Third, the one after the second view tries to put the two ideas together. It says that we should try to follow the group of things because it helps the group run easy, but we should also watch the kind of person and be ready to change the group of things when it stops a kind act. People who hold this view often say that the best place is one where the group of things is a help, not a wall, and where a kind heart can still act.  

In the end, the question stays hard because each answer has a reason. Some people feel safe when the group of things is clear. Some people feel warm when they see a kind heart. The story shows that the kind of person and the group of things both make what we see, and we may need to think about both when we try to make a place that feels safe and warm.

english_query: why the rules should be the same for everyone
ugf_response:
Person 1: Why do we need the same ways to act for all people?

Person 2: Because it is good to give everyone the same care and chance.

Person 1: What happens if some people get different ways to act?

Person 2: Then some people might feel sad or left out.

Person 1: Does it matter if the ways to act are hard?

Person 2: Yes, but it matters more that they are the same for you and me.

Person 1: So it is about being the same in rights?

Person 2: Yes, being the same in rights helps us trust each other.

Person 1: That makes sense to me.

english_query: the way to help yourself think about hard questions step by step
ugf_response: First, we must look at the big question and break it into small parts that are easy to see. Second, we must find the things that we know are true and the things that we only think might be true. Third, we look at how the small parts go together and how one thing can lead to another. The step after the third step is to check our own thoughts to see if we are doing something wrong in how we see things. The step after that is to look at the things we found to see if they answer the big question. Finally, we write down what we found so we can look at it again later.

english_query: I see no reason why we should feel bad about our showing, old teacher.
ugf_response: He will say: You mean to talk that the man whom we only think of and do not see, cannot be put together with the horse which we do not see or touch, but only think of and do not know? That I believe to be my meaning, I will say.

english_query: when one person doing something first changes what others do
ugf_response: First, we look at a room where many people are sitting. One person stands up to stretch their legs. Then, another person sees this and thinks it is time to stand too. Soon, many people are standing. The hard question here is why the second person changed what they were doing. Some people say the second person did it because they wanted to be like the first person. They think people like to do the same things as others so they feel part of the group. Others say the second person did it because they thought the first person knew something they did not. Maybe the first person heard a noise or felt the room getting hot. So the second person did the very same thing to stay safe or feel good in their body. This shows that when one person acts, others may change what they do not just because they want to, but because they are trying to guess what is best to do. We can see that what we do can push others to change, even if we do not ask them to. This makes us think about how much power one person has over the group just by moving or acting first.

english_query: why who someone is to you changes what you should do for them
ugf_response:
Person one: Why does what I do for one person change if that person is a friend or a stranger?

Person two: It is because the way you feel about a person changes how much you give to them.

Person one: But if two people need the same thing, should I not do the same thing for both?

Person two: Not always. When you have a way of being tied to someone, you feel a strong pull to help them more than most people. You have a special place for them in your heart.

Person one: So if I have more than one thing to give, I should give more to the person I love?

Person two: Yes. You use your things to keep those close to you safe and happy. A stranger is just a person you do not know, but a friend is part of your own life.

Person one: Does this mean I am not doing the same thing for the people I do not know?

Person two: It is not about doing the same thing for everyone. It is about how we build a world where people who care for each other stay strong. We give more to those who are part of our circle.

english_query: why being sure about something does not make it right
ugf_response:
Person one: I feel so sure about this thing. If I am very sure, does that mean it is true?

Person two: No, being sure is not the same as being right. You can feel very strong about a thing that is not true.

Person one: How can that be? If my heart and my head both say it is true, why would it be wrong?

Person two: Your mind can be made to believe something that is not true. You might see only the things that make you feel right and not see the things that show you are wrong. This makes you feel strong even when you are not.

Person one: So, if I only look for things that agree with me, I will stay wrong?

Person two: Yes. That is how it works. You build a wall of things that say you are right, and you do not look at the things that say you are wrong.

Person one: That makes me feel afraid. What should I do instead?

Person two: You should look for the things that might show you are wrong. Do not just look for things that make you feel good.

Person one: If I find a thing that shows I am wrong, does that mean I should change what I think?

Person two: If the thing is real and it shows you the truth, then yes. Being right is more important than feeling sure.

english_query: the idea that you should only follow rules everyone could agree to
ugf_response: First, we look at the way people live together. We see that people often do things that make others feel bad or hurt. To stop this, we need a way to decide what is good and what is bad. One way to do this is to make a set of things that people must do. We call these things the ways people must act. Now, we look at a special way to make these things. This way says that a way of acting is only good if every person could say yes to it. We must think about what would happen if everyone lived by that way. We must ask if every person, using their own mind, would say yes to it. If a way of acting would make it so that people can not live together, then it is not a good way. We must not pick a way that only helps one person or a small group of people. Instead, we must pick a way that any person could say is right. If we can not find a way that every person can agree to, then we have not found a good way to act. This means we must look for ways of acting that work for everyone, no matter who they are. This is how we find the right ways to live together.

english_query: how doing good things over and over makes you into a good person
ugf_response:
The first idea is that a person can do things that are right many times. The second idea is that doing these right things again and again changes who that person is. The person says that if you do what is right many times, you will become a person who is good.

The thing that follows from these ideas is that how a person acts in the world tells us what kind of person they are deep inside. If a person always acts in a way that helps others, we can say that they are a good person. We see the way they are good by the things they do.

We must look at if this way of thinking is good. One way to look at it is to say that it is a good way to think. If we do things in a right way, it can change how we think and how we feel. Doing a right thing can make it easier to do that same right thing again. In this way, the things we do and who we are become the same thing.

However, there is another way to look at it. A person might do a right thing only because they want something else, or because they are afraid. In those cases, the person is not doing the thing because they are good, but because they want to get something. If we only look at what a person does, we might think they are good when they are actually thinking about themselves. So, the thinking might not be very good if it does not look at why the person is doing the thing.

english_query: And are not all things either good or bad, or in the middle and not caring?
ugf_response: To be sure, old teacher.

Since she must do one of the two things and she is not doing the first one, she has to do the second one. So, it is true that she will take the bus. This last idea follows for sure from the first ideas. follows

Person number two: Yes. You must look at both. You look at the world and you look at your own heart. When you do both, you will find a path that is most right.

english_query: how some ideas stop you from thinking further
ugf_response: First, we must look at how a person thinks. A person has many thoughts in their head. Sometimes, a person finds a thought that feels very strong and very true. This thought acts like a wall. When a person hits this wall, they stop moving forward with their thinking. This happens because the person thinks their thought is the only way things can be. They do not want to look at other ways because those ways might make their strong thought look bad. Second, we see that a person might also hold onto a thought because it makes them feel safe. If a new thought makes them feel afraid or makes them feel like they were wrong before, they will push the new thought away. They stay with the old thought to keep feeling good about what they know. Third, we see that when people stay with these old thoughts, they stop asking new questions. If you do not ask new questions, your mind does not go to new places. You stay in the same spot. This is how a thought can stop you from seeing more of the truth. Finally, we see that to move past this, a person must be willing to let go of what they think is true so they can find what is actually true.

english_query: Great! You’ve spotted the classic dilemma. In future sessions you can explore how a repeated weekly interaction or a binding pact might let both taverns keep more profit.
ugf_response: First, we look at two places trying to get the same people to buy from them. If both try to ask for less money, they both end up with less money. This is a bad thing for both. Then, we think about what happens if they talk. If they agree to keep the money they ask for high, they both keep more money. This is a good thing. But someone might say one place could break the word. If one place keeps the money high and the other asks for less, the one with less money gets all the people. This makes the first place want to ask for less money too. So, the fear of breaking the word makes it hard to keep the good thing. Even so, if they see each other every week, they know they will meet again. If one breaks the word now, the other will make the money low next week. This fear of bad things later stops them from breaking the word now. So, seeing each other again helps them keep the good thing. Meeting again and again helps both sides keep the money they ask for high because they fear bad things in the future if they break their word today.

english_query: how to decide whose good matters and how much
ugf_response:
When we think about what is good, we must ask a hard question. We must ask which people get to have their good things seen as important. This is hard because every person wants their own good things to be the most important.

First, we must look at how we choose who counts. One way is to say that every person is the same. In this way, you do not pick one person over another. You say that the good of one person is just as big as the good of any other person. This means if you have to choose between helping one person or helping ten people, you look at how much good there is in all. You try to make the whole lot of good as big as it can be for everyone.

Second, we can look at how people act. Some people say we should look at what a person does. We look at the things people do to see if they are good or bad. We then try to make a way of living that follows what we think is good. This way does not just look at the whole lot of good. It looks at whether the things we do are the right things to do.

Third, we can think about what we must do for others. This way says that there are things we must do for people, no matter how much good it brings. For one case, you might say you cannot hurt one person even if it makes ten people very happy. You say that each person has a right to be seen in a certain way.

To decide how much good matters, we must also look at how much we can give. Some people think that a little bit of good for a lot of people is better than a big bit of good for only one person. Others think that we must make sure the person who has the least gets more help first.

There is no easy way to answer these questions. We are always trying to find a way to be good to others. We must think about how our choices hurt or help the people around us. We must try to find a way to be good to everyone in a way that is right.

We need to see if this means the box does not come tomorrow. The first idea uses the word 'or'. In many cases, 'or' allows for both things to be true at the same time. For a case in point, it is possible for a box to be brought here today and also for another box to come tomorrow. The first line does not say 'only one' can happen. It just says at least one happens. So, knowing the box comes today does not force the idea that it cannot come tomorrow. Both could be true. So the last idea does not follow for sure. does not follow

english_query: Two pure‑strategy Nash equilibria exist: (Ballad, Ballad) with payoffs (4,2) and (Sparring, Sparring) with payoffs (2,4). Both players prefer being together over being apart, yet each prefers a different equilibrium. A mixed‑strategy equilibrium also exists, giving each player an expected payoff of 1.6, which is inferior to either pure equilibrium.
ugf_response: First, we look at the two ways the players can do well. One way is for both to pick the first choice, giving them points of 4 and 2. The other way is for both to pick the second choice, giving them points of 2 and 4. In both of these cases, the added up points are 6, and no one gets a low point count. Next, we look at the way where they pick by chance. The problem says this gives each person a point count of 1.6. This is much lower than 2 or 4. So, the chance way is bad for everyone. Now we must decide between the two good ways. The first person likes the first way better because 4 is more than 2. The second person likes the second way better because 4 is more than 2. This is a fight over who gets the better spot. If they cannot talk to each other to agree, they might end up picking different things, which usually means a point count of 0 or something very low, even worse than the chance way. But the question asks us to think about the set ways that are there. The chance one is clearly the worst. Between the two set ways, they are both safe. If they both pick the first, no one wants to change. If they both pick the second, no one wants to change. So the strongest answer is that they should try to agree on one of the two set ways because both are better than the chance way. There is no single best set way for both, but either set way is better than the chance one. The players should try to agree on one of the two set choices because both give higher points than the chance choice, even though they like different set choices better.

english_query: Either the suspect was at home or the suspect was at work. The suspect was at home. Therefore, the suspect was not at work. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.

The word 'or' here usually means you pick one and not both. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us for sure that the person was at home. Now we ask if this means the person was not at work. If the first idea meant one or the other but not both, then yes, being at home means not being at work. But if the first idea meant one or the other or maybe both, then we do not know for sure. In normal talk, 'either...or' often suggests a choice between two different places. You cannot be in two places at the same time. So if the person is at home, they are not at work. The last idea says the person was not at work. Since a person cannot be in two places at once, being at home makes it true that they are not at work. So the last idea follows for sure. follows

So, if the loud noise maker goes off, she stops sleeping, and because she stops sleeping, the small thing in the dirt gets bigger. This group of events joins the start to the end. There is no missing part in the story. If the first thing happens, the second thing must happen. If the second thing happens, the third thing must happen. So if the first thing happens, the third thing must happen too. The last idea says exactly this. It joins the loud noise maker to the small thing in the dirt. english_query: how to decide whose good matters and how much
ugf_response:
Imagine a world where we must choose how to help people. We want to make things good and stop bad things from happening. But we have a big problem. We do not have enough time, enough money, or enough food to help everyone. Because of this, we must make choices. We must decide which people get help and which people do not. This is a very hard thing to do.

The hard question is this: How do we choose who gets the most good? When we have to pick between helping one person or helping many people, how do we know which choice is the right one? How do we know if the good feeling of one person is the same as the good feeling of another person?

Some people say we should only look at all the good in the world put together. They think we should try to make the biggest number of good things happen. If helping ten people makes more good than helping one person, they will pick the ten people. They want the most good for the most people. To them, the best way is to count the good things and pick the path that gives us the biggest number.

Other people think this way is wrong. They say that every person is important in their own way. They think it is not right to use one person to make things better for others. They believe we have a must to look after people in a certain way. For them, it is not about the big number. It is about doing what is right for each person right now. They might say we should help the person who is in the most pain first, even if it does not help the most people in the end.

There are also people who think we should look at how much a person can do. They might think we should help a person who can then help many other people. They think this is a good way to make the good in the world grow. But this can lead to bad things, because it might mean we ignore people who cannot help anyone else.

Each of these ways of thinking has a different way of seeing what is good. First, one looks at all the good put together. Second, one looks at what we must do for each person. Third, one looks at how much good can grow from a single choice. There is no easy way to know which way is the best. We must keep thinking about it.

english_query: "By the fire's glow, we can shield our kin. Tell me, do you wish to promise safety to a few, or gamble that all will walk home unharmed? Remember, a word can bend a steel heart as much as a hammer."
ugf_response: First we see the fire light from a fire stick that can keep us warm and can be used to make a safe place. Then the line about keep our people we love safe means we can keep the ones we care about safe. The next line asks if we want to say we will keep a few safe or take a chance that all will walk home not hurt. This sounds like a choice between using a key word that locks a strong door for some people or letting everyone walk in without a lock. A key word that can bend a hard metal part is a word that can open a strong lock. So the best answer is to use a key word to keep the few safe rather than hope all are safe without it. Some may say that a lock stops only a few and the rest are still at chance of a bad thing, but the lock stops a big bad thing for those who need it. Even if a lock can stop a bad thing, it does not stop the good things that need to go in. So the safe choice is to use a word that locks the strong door. The other side would be to have no word and hope everything is safe, but that is a big chance of bad. The best answer is to use a key word to say we will keep a few safe rather than take a chance that all will be safe without it.

english_query: why what you already believe changes how you see new things
ugf_response:
You have a set of ideas in your head about how the world works. These ideas are like a set of glasses that you put on your eyes. When you look at something new, you do not see it as it is in its real state. Instead, you see it through these glasses. The glasses change the way the new thing looks to you. If your glasses are blue, everything you see will look blue. If you think that all people are bad, you will look at a new person and see only the bad things they do. You will not see the good things because your eyes are looking for what you already think is true.

The hard question is this. How can we ever know what is real if we can never take off our glasses? If everything we see is changed by what we already believe, how do we know if our ideas are right or wrong? It is hard to see the truth when our own minds are working to make the new thing fit into our old ideas.

Some people might say that we should try to stop thinking about what we already know when we see something new. They might say we should try to be like a clean piece of paper. They think that if we can clear our minds, we can see things as they are. But this is very hard to do. It is something that cannot be done.

Other people might say that we should use our old ideas to help us understand. They think that without our old ideas, a new thing would be too hard to understand. They say that we need our old ideas to give us a place to start. To them, the old ideas are like a map. Even if the map is not the very same as the land, it is better than having no map at all while you walk through a dark forest.

Third, a group of people might say that we should always look for things that show our old ideas are wrong. Instead of looking for things that make us feel right, they say we should look for things that make us feel wrong. They think that if we find something that does not fit our glasses, we must change the glasses. They believe that the only way to get closer to the truth is to find where we were not right.

english_query: Also, a place that has nothing is no good. But after the bad act, the happy garden had no people living in it. So if it was made as a home for people, it seems god made the happy garden for no use.
ugf_response: Even though the happy garden was not no good because no people lived in it after the bad act, it is not like give people never die for no good, even though they would lose it. This show god good to people and what people lost by the bad act. Also some say the old man from a far place and the old man from another far place still live in the happy garden.

english_query: If the river is high, then the bank is flooded. The bank is dry. Therefore, the river is low. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says if the river is high, then the bank gets wet with water. This sets up a clear tie. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us the bank is dry. This means the bank is not wet with water. Now we join these two things. If the river being high always makes the bank wet, and the bank is not wet, then the river could not have been high. So, we know the river is not high. The last thing said is that the river is low. We need to think about what 'not high' means. Does 'not high' mean it must be 'low'? There might be other choices. The river could be at a middle place, where it is not high but also not low. If the river is at a middle place, it might not make the bank wet, yet it is not low. So, it is possible for the river to be in the middle. If the river is in the middle, the bank can be dry, and the first idea is still true. But the last thing said is that the river is low. Since the river could be in the middle, we cannot be sure it is low. It does not follow for sure that the river is low just because it is not high. does not follow

english_query: Archivist Lira, a behavioral economist cloaked as a temple keeper, teaches fairness through interactive puzzles.
ugf_response: First, we look at the person who keeps old books but also teaches about how people share. She uses games to show what is right when people give things to each other. The big thing we care about is if people will trust each other and be kind. If they learn to share well, they can work together better. Then, we see that playing games is a strong way to teach because it feels fun and real. People remember doing things more than just hearing words. But some might say that games are not the same as real life and people might act bad in games but good outside. Even so, learning to be good in a safe game often helps people be good in real life too. So this means her way of using games is a good idea. Using games to teach sharing is a strong way to help people learn to be kind and trust each other. It works because doing things helps us learn better than just listening.

english_query: In the bustling apothecary shop of Eldermist, the owner, Master Alric, needs two rare ingredients for a life‑saving elixir. One ingredient is the Golden Stag’s Antler, which can only be harvested if two alchemists work together to lure the elusive stag. The other is the Common Hare’s Foot, which any single alchemist can collect from the nearby meadow.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first thing needed. It takes two people to get it. One person cannot do it. Then, we look at the second thing. One person can get it. The big problem is that if there is only one worker, they can get the second thing but not the first. Without the first thing, the drink is not good. So, the shop needs at least two workers. If there are two, they can work together for the first thing. This means the group must be big enough to cover the hard job. The shop needs at least two workers because the first thing needs a pair to get it.

english_query: It seems our mind can know the thing without end. For God is bigger than all things without end. But our mind can know God, as we said before. So much more can our mind know all other things without end.
ugf_response: God is called without end because his true shape is not held back by stuff; but in things made of stuff, without end means missing a true shape. We know true shape, but we cannot know stuff without shape. So the thing without end in stuff is not known. But God, who is without end in shape, is known by himself; but we do not know him because our mind is not strong and only fits for stuff now. So we cannot know God now except by seeing what stuff he made. Later, our mind will be fixed, and we will see what God is, but we will not hold all of him in our mind.

So if too much own love and want of what others have can be in the ones, then for the same reason other bad acts can also be in them.

english_query: how to think about what is fair when people start in different places
ugf_response:
Person 1: How do we know if something is right when people do not start at the same place?

Person 2: That is a hard question. We must look at what each person has and what they need. If one person has a lot and another has none, giving them the same thing may not be right.

Person 1: So should we give more to the one who has less?

Person 2: Yes, if we want them to have the same chance to do well. It is like a run. If one person starts far back, they need help to catch up.

Person 1: But is it right to the one who started ahead?

Person 2: It is right if we want everyone to have a real chance. Doing what is right is not just about the same ways. It is about the same hope for a good life.

Person 1: I see. So doing what is right means helping those who are behind.

Person 2: Exactly. We try to make the start the same for everyone, even if they were born in different spots.
